channel.title: Bridgeport Updates
channel.description: Updates for Bridgeport - local MCP connector host for macOS

item.title: Version 1.0.12
item.description:
Bridgeport 1.0.12

Adds a user-facing option to show or hide the app icon in the Dock while running.

  • A new toggle in the Settings dashboard controls whether Bridgeport appears in the Dock or lives only in the menu bar.
  • Defaults to off, preserving the existing menu-bar-only behavior.
  • Opening Settings temporarily shows the Dock icon regardless; closing it restores the preference.

item.title: Version 1.0.11
item.description:
Bridgeport 1.0.11

Keeps cloud MCP connectors signed in after their 12-hour access token expires.

  • OAuth clients now receive rotating refresh tokens.
  • Refresh tokens are bound to their client and MCP resource, and cannot be reused after rotation.
  • Existing token files remain readable. Connections created before this release need one new sign-in.

item.title: Version 1.0.9
item.description:
Bridgeport 1.0.9

Adds automatic updates via Sparkle, and the project is now open source under GPL-3.0.

  • A Check for Updates… item in the menu bar menu, with automatic update checks.
  • Updates are EdDSA-signed and verified before extraction; the app remains Developer ID signed and notarized.
  • Bridge iconography from 1.0.8 is included for installs upgrading from 1.0.7 or earlier.
